text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One evening, after a bit of shopping,
Matikanefukukitaru and I are walking<n>through the
shopping district when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Look at all those people. Do you<n>think a
fortune teller has set up shop<n>or something?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with<n>our New
Year's raffle! This year's<n>grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation<n>for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot<n>hamburger
steak! Second-prize<n>winners get a bushel of
carrots! And<n>third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you over there with the<n>daruma charm
on your head? Care to<n>give it a spin?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A raffle? A game that tests our luck?!<n>Mwahaha!
The gods must have<n>wanted me to see this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's like drawing a fortune slip with a<n>prize
attached! There's no way we<n>can pass this up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, some change please... No,<n>you have a
raffle ticket, don't you?!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I think I got one while we were shopping.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Okay, let's join hands and<n>fuse our
energies into one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With our luck combined, there's<n>nothing to fear! I
just know it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Our spiritual energies channeled as<n>one, we reach
out and grasp the<n>handle of the raffle spinner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She belts out a rattling cry as we give<n>it a strong
crank.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the<n>spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves<n>a
grand-prize winner! Come and get<n>the coupon for
your hot spring<n>vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Praise be! Receiving the<n>grand-prize is
just like receiving a<n>great blessing at the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With both the gods and Buddha in this<n>world, I
guess we reap double the<n>rewards for good
deeds!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo! Wa-wa-hurray!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't know where she came up<n>with that chant,
but<n>Matikanefukukitaru seems to be over<n>the
moon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! We really won! That means<n>we can go
together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We just have to decide when. A<n>lucky trip like this
needs to have an<n>appropriately auspicious day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So it would probably be best to leave<n>it up to the
fortune slips. What do you<n>say, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Sure, let's leave it up to fate.
Sure, let's leave it up to fate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right then! Onward to today's<n>second lucky
draw!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We head to a shrine to let the fortune<n>slips
determine the date for our<n>vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The slips usually have a section on<n>them devoted
to travel plans, so we<n>decide to use that for
reference.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's give this an unravel...<n>And here we
are!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Now, what do we have here...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyahhhhh! What does this mean?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this! It usually says<n>something like
"the present time is<n>fortuitous" or "a location in the
northeast would be favorable."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But look! It says, "You're gonna want<n>to wait a
year—trust me. ♪"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pretty direct for a fortune, don't you<n>think?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One year... I guess the gods want us<n>to wait a
while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a shame. However, to<n>ignore a direction
from the divine<n>would be a grave transgression.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Good things come to those who wait,<n>after all! I'm
sure there's a very<n>good reason for the delay.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's only one year! Will you<n>join me for
the hot springs when that<n>time comes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, the hot springs aren't<n>going
anywhere! And if they did, I'd<n>chase them down.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay, it's a promise! I'm gonna hold<n>you to it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when that day comes, we'll<n>soak in there for
hours on end and<n>feast on the finest local
delicacies!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Put 'er there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The clasp of our handshake echoes<n>through the
air. With a hot spring trip<n>to look forward to,
Matikanefukukitaru's enthusiasm is<n>at an all-time
high.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize<n>winner!
Congratulations! You get one<n>deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! It's not the grand-prize, but this<n>isn't half
bad! I'd compare it to<n>pulling "good fortune" on a
fortune<n>slip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! It's so packed with<n>nutrients, just one
bite will probably<n>take you straight to heaven.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And the carrot's reddish hue looks<n>awfully
auspicious...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But it's still missing<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's lacking the rich flavors befitting a<n>New Year's
feast. If we want this<n>hamburger steak to be even
more<n>auspicious...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide to go along with whatever
Matikanefukukitaru has in mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We can use the kitchen here to make<n>a cream
sauce to go on top of the<n>hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's ready! The reddish carrot<n>and white
cream sauce together give<n>it a celebratory flair!
That's a lucky<n>color combination, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What joy! What bliss! All right,<n>Trainer, let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy the meal together. Her<n>homemade
sauce really adds a rich,<n>creamy depth to the dish!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's<n>your lucky
day! You're going home<n>with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Carrots, eh? Well, the sheer number<n>of them is
nothing to scoff at, so I'd<n>say this is about the
same as<n>"modest fortune" on a fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We should definitely be accepting<n>them with
gratitude in our hearts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Still, it wouldn't do to keep these all to<n>ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I know! Trainer, why don't we go on<n>a pilgrimage
of good fortune, sharing<n>our blessings far and
wide?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, we go around handing out<n>carrots to all
the Umamusume we<n>meet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Fukukitaru. I'll eat it<n>during my break
at training.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oho! The heck do we have here? A<n>carrot? Don't
mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: I owe you one. And I always pay my<n>debts.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After handing out three carrots...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait just a second! At this rate,<n>we'll be at
this until morning!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why don't we just eat the rest of<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Cutting our pilgrimage short at three<n>stops, we
gorge on the rest of the<n>carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won<n>the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Just one measly carrot?!<n>This must be
the work of the<n>demon-goddess Kishimojin!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If this were a fortune slip, maybe it<n>would be
"modest fortune." Eh, on<n>second thought, it's
more like... "meh<n>fortune."

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't remember ever seeing "meh<n>fortune" on
one of those slips before,<n>but sure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, even one carrot makes for a<n>preeetty good
snack. Let's dig in,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We split the carrot in half and enjoy a<n>small snack
together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All finished? Okay. Let us bring our<n>humble feast
to a close, and celebrate<n>with the traditional single
clap!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaaand...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sound of our clap echoes through<n>the air. It
somehow makes the whole<n>event feel a bit more
special.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you<n>pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of<n>tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Tissues?! Is this the malady that has<n>been
forewarned for centuries—do we<n>have a "dud" on
our hands?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This is just like receiving"misfortune" on a fortune slip! No,make that "great misfortune"! Howcould this happen to us?! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's turn this around and<n>make paper
dolls out of them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To ward off evil spirits. They'll take<n>the brunt of
the bad luck for us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! Let's get<n>to folding!
Chop-chop!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We make paper dolls out of all the<n>tissues. Their
faces are crumpled with<n>misfortune.
